title: Cinematica
description: This mod adds the functionality to record cinematics and play them back to any player or a group of players.
body:
## **How to use it**

- First create your cinematic with /cinematic create (name)
- Add your keyframes using /cinematic keyframes (name of your cinematic)
- If you want to change the cinematic mode, you can use /cinematic mode (name of your cinematic) linear/smooth
- If you want to cut a part of your cinematic, use /cinematic cut (name of your cinematic) (keyframe number) (keyframe number)
- To play your cinematic use /cinematic play (name of your cinematic) (speed)
- But if you want to prevent your cinematic from playing for a team, type /cinematic play_except (name of your cinematic) (speed) (team name)
- And to see your cinematic with particles put /cinematic preview (name of your cinematic)
- You can use /cinematic stop to stop the current cinematic playing


![Commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7b841879e31d1c18752abbd10192395a18699da.png)
